'''Rafa IV''' was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a colony world of the [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

Before the Sharu uprising in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], its main city [[Teguta Lusat]] was the capital of the Rafa system. Rafa IV was governed by [[Duttes Mer]], colonial governor of the Rafa.<ref name="LCMS" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Rafa IV in the Quelli sector (a misspelling of the true [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]).
